title: HackSC 2025
description: 24-hour hackathon at USC. Built an accessibility tool to help users with motor disabilities navigate digital interfaces more intuitively.

title: TreeHacks 2024
description: Stanford's flagship hackathon. Collaborated with a four-person team to design and prototype a mental-health journaling app with AI reflection prompts.

title: Google LA Office Tour
description: Visited Google's Los Angeles campus for a UX deep-dive session and networking dinner with product designers and researchers.

title: Disney Imagineering Tour
description: Behind-the-scenes tour of Disney's Imagineering campus, exploring how storytelling, physical design, and technology converge to create memorable guest experiences.

title: SXSW Interactive 2025
description: Attended panels on AI ethics, the future of spatial computing, and human-centered design at South by Southwest in Austin.

title: Google Design Sprint
description: Completed a 5-day design sprint workshop, working through the full sprint methodology — mapping, sketching, deciding, prototyping, and testing with real users.

title: 1st Place — Newegg Gamer Zone Workshop
description: WD & UGREEN Educational Technology Workshop. Proposed a next-generation PC café service model with character collaborations and an immersive gaming space.

title: USC IYA Vibe Coding Hackathon Award
description: Designed an automated messaging app supporting medication adherence and communication for elderly patients, delivering a functional MVP within four hours.

title: Seoul Mayor's Award
description: Social Problem Solving Prize at Human City Design University Workshop. Recognized for innovative human-centered urban design thinking.

title: Korea+Sweden Young Design Award
description: International design competition for young designers. Received the award twice — Excellence Prize (Nov 2020) and full award (Oct 2021).

title: Lotte Scholarship Foundation
description: Competitive scholarship awarded in recognition of academic excellence and potential for positive social contribution.

title: Hongik University Internal Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship from Hongik University for sustained academic performance across the BFA and Game Software programs.
